name: Hellmann's Chicken Potato Salad Ole
recipeIngredient: 2 lbs small red potatoes, cooked and sliced into 1/4-inch thick pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine chopped tomatoes, green onion, cilantro, jalapeno peppers, and 1 teaspoon of salt. Set aside.
2. In a large bowl, mix together Hellmann's mayonnaise, lime juice, chili powder, ground cumin, and remaining 1/2 teaspoon salt.
3. Add the cooked potatoes, shredded chicken, yellow bell pepper, and half of the tomato mixture to the dressing. Toss well to coat everything evenly.
4. Cover and refrigerate until ready to serve.
5. To serve, place salad onto a lettuce-lined platter. Spoon the remaining tomato mixture over the top of the salad. Optionally garnish with tortilla chips and lime wedges.
